description: The LegacyRadioGroup component was used to manage multiple Legacy Radios as part of a list of exclusive options. This component is a part of migrated content and should not be used in new content. This component should be replaced whenever possible.

fields._selectedOption: The Legacy Radio this component has as the chosen option.
fields._choiceVisual: the slot of the choice check mark.
fields._choicePosition: The field to drive to position the check mark.
fields._choiceRotation: The field to drive for the check mark's rotation.
fields._choiceScale: The field to drive for the check mark's scale.
fields._choiceMaterial: The material of the check mark visual.
